title: Air Conditioning Installation
desc: We provide professional air conditioning installation services for homes and businesses across the GTA. Our team helps you choose the right system for your space and ensures a clean, safe, and code-compliant installation. Whether you’re upgrading an old unit or installing a new AC system, we deliver energy-efficient cooling solutions built for long-term comfort and performance.

### Our Guarantees to Our Clients

At QuickFast, we stand behind our work and our team. With over 15 years of service, we are committed to delivering reliable workmanship, professional service, and dependable results for every home, condo, and business we serve.

​We Respect Your Property

Our technicians treat every property with care and professionalism. We work cleanly, protect your space during service, and ensure the job site is left tidy and damage-free.

​

Customer Satisfaction Guaranteed

Your satisfaction is our priority. If you are not satisfied with our service, workmanship, or professionalism, our team will work with you to make it right.

​

Fast & Reliable Service

We understand that repairs and maintenance are important for your home or business. Our team responds quickly and works efficiently to resolve issues and minimize disruption.

​

Quality Workmanship

We take pride in delivering high-quality installations, repairs, and maintenance services. Our experienced technicians ensure every job is completed to professional standards so your systems operate safely and efficiently.

## Stop Renting, Start Owning: The Smart Way to Upgrade Your AC

![Generate HD Image of HVAC Technician with newly installed AC - COmpany is QuickFast.jpg](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/824e75_5371129546d84dadac1bfadc8063dc30~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_391,h_391,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/Generate%20HD%20Image%20of%20HVAC%20Technician%20with%20newly%20installed%20AC%20-%20COmpany%20is%20QuickFast.jpg)

![HVAC guy installed AC.jpg](https://static.wixstatic.com/media/824e75_6a8d6b5008e64a2ebc41eebed6a9e2ff~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_391,h_391,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01,enc_avif,quality_auto/HVAC%20guy%20installed%20AC.jpg)

01

Significant Cost Savings\
When you rent an AC monthly payments can add up quickly. Over time, homeowners can end up paying several times the actual value of the unit. Purchasing your AC helps you avoid long-term rental fees and keep more money in your pocket.

​

02

No Long-Term Rental Contracts\
Owning your AC means no restrictive contracts, hidden terms, or expensive buyout fees. You get the freedom to upgrade, replace, or service your system whenever you choose.

03

Increased Home Value\
A purchased AC is considered a valuable home asset. Unlike rental equipment—which can complicate or delay home sales—an owned system can improve buyer confidence and increase property value.

04

Full Control Over Maintenance\
When you own your AC, you have complete control over maintenance and service providers. You can choose trusted technicians, schedule service when convenient, and manage costs more effectively.
